title: TeamPCP Supply Chain Campaign: Update 003 - Operational Tempo Shift as Campaign

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - TeamPCP Supply Chain Campaign: Update 003 - Operational Temp
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/04/02
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*crates.io*'
            - '*isc.sans.edu*'
            - '*sans.org*'
            - '*tpcp.tar.gz*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
